title: Sample: AFA Singapore watchlist points fans toward ticket timing, merch lines, and artist alley planning
summary: A seeded demo story showing how the feed can prioritize Anime Festival Asia-style updates for Singapore users who care about tickets, freebies, and artist alley strategy.
content: This prototype headline stands in for convention planning coverage. It emphasizes ticket timing, merch queue management, and quick mobile-friendly summaries for Singapore attendees.

title: Sample: MLBB weekend qualifiers gain traction with Singapore campus teams and community brackets

content: The article highlights qualifiers, watch parties, and match-day logistics. Singapore relevance remains high because the story mentions local teams, community events, and regional esports culture.

title: Sample: HoyoFest-style merch drop guide focuses on budgeting, queue time, and bundle picks in SGD
summary: A seeded merch and gacha story designed to show why price-sensitive fans in Singapore might want sale and bundle alerts ranked above generic global news.
content: The prototype highlights merch bundles, promo timing, and budget-conscious fan recommendations with SGD pricing cues and event queue expectations.

title: Sample: New JRPG demo roundup filters upcoming releases by story tone, combat feel, and console availability

content: The article emphasizes JRPG discovery, platform support, and why search-time retrieval matters when users want a specific subgenre instead of a broad latest feed.

title: Sample: Singapore comic convention prototype spotlights indie creators, zines, and small press pickups

content: The piece emphasizes indie booths, self-published comics, and creator discovery for convention-going audiences who want more than mainstream publisher updates.
